notes: Folder-scoped change events use Drive's changes.watch push channel (webhook). Account-wide and worksheet-level deltas fall back to polling.

triggers.name: New File
triggers.description: Fires when any new file is added (inside any folder).

triggers.name: New File in Folder
triggers.description: Fires when a new file is created within, moved to, or uploaded directly to a specific folder. Optionally includes subfolders.

triggers.name: New Folder
triggers.description: Fires when a new folder is added directly to a specific folder (not subfolders).

triggers.name: Updated File
triggers.description: Fires when a file is updated in a specific folder (not subfolders).
